description: Pure data tool: resolves view crops, dimension crops, and feature crop path for a single feature name. No LLM call.

feature_name.description: The feature name to resolve context for

output_dir.description: Root output directory used to locate crop subdirectories

view_crops_json.description: JSON array of {name, path} objects from crop_views

dim_data_json.description: JSON object keyed by feature name; each value has dims and dim_crop_paths arrays

all_features_json.description: JSON array of all features from crop_features
